personal.name: Farhan Sadeque
personal.title: Computer Science & Engineering Student
personal.subtitle: Building intelligent software solutions, AI-powered applications, and scalable systems while leading technical communities and innovative projects.
personal.bio: Hey! I am Farhan Sadeque, a CSC senior at IUB with an eager mind on data, code, and data analysis — everything that piques my interest. I take a plunge into software development and love to materialize ideas into actual projects — full-stack web applications, smart inventory management, and dashboards. I enjoy analytics, time hacks, and other ways to simplify everyday life by means of technology. I also coordinate events, artistic ventures, and work with teams where brainstorming and coffee are synonymous. I am a builder, thinker, and life-long learner who is always ready to take on a challenge — and perhaps have some fun in the process.

education.details: Focusing on Software Engineering, Artificial Intelligence, Data Analysis, and Computer Vision. Actively participating in national hackathons, leading student-driven technology initiatives, and representing IUB in inter-university competitions.
Completed Higher Secondary education in the Science group, building a strong foundation in mathematics, physics, and analytical thinking.

projects.title: Pedi-Growth
projects.subtitle: AI Gait Analysis Platform
projects.description: An AI-powered pediatric gait analysis platform designed for healthcare professionals and researchers to screen and evaluate developmental gait abnormalities in children.
features: Real-time video skeleton pose estimation using advanced computer vision models
Intelligent early screening for common developmental delays and motor anomalies
Automated medical report generation with custom annotations
Interactive clinical dashboard for longitudinal patient tracking and analytics
Server-side video queue processing and deep biomechanical visual analytics

projects.title: Nirapotta
projects.subtitle: Disaster Communication OS
projects.description: A disaster operating system built on a self-healing mesh architecture that enables communication during disasters when conventional telecommunication infrastructure becomes unavailable. Secured Runner-Up position at NSU Cybernauts 2026.
features: Self-healing mesh communication architecture for disaster scenarios
Decentralized mesh communication protocol utilizing local device networking
Emergency point-to-point and broadcast offline messaging capabilities
Real-time coordinate sharing and rescue request dispatch pipeline
Centralized coordinator control center for aid agencies and volunteer groups

projects.title: Agricultural Supply Chain System
projects.subtitle: IoT-Enabled Tracking & Monitoring
projects.description: An enterprise agricultural supply chain management platform integrating IoT sensors to secure grain storage, reduce food waste, and automate shipment logistics.
features: Real-time vehicle shipment tracking and live telemetry updates
Environmental GPS and temperature/humidity IoT sensor dashboards
Smart inventory alerts, automated storage logs, and shelf-life forecasting
Data-driven operational analytics powered by Power BI integrations

projects.title: Dengue Early Warning Platform
projects.subtitle: Predictive Disease Visualization
projects.description: A public health dashboard designed to predict outbreak vectors, manage volunteer response forces, and visualize dengue contagion density dynamically.
features: Machine learning models predicting outbreak probabilities based on regional weather
Citizen-driven incident reporting pipeline with visual mapping coordinates
Live density mapping using interactive geospatial maps and SVG visualizers
Voluntary coordination dispatch system for local vector-eradication initiatives

projects.title: IoT-Based Earthquake Response Platform
projects.subtitle: Centralized Recovery System for Bangladesh
projects.description: An IoT-based centralized earthquake response and recovery platform for Bangladesh, developed under the theme 'Innovative Earthquake Resilience: Smart Response and Recovery Mechanisms'. Won Champion in Poster Presentation at Disaster Management Exercise 4.0 (BUP).
features: IoT sensor integration for real-time seismic activity monitoring
Centralized earthquake response coordination dashboard
Smart recovery mechanisms and resource allocation system
Post-disaster assessment and recovery tracking tools

responsibilities: Empowering students with industry-relevant, practical skills in software testing.
Bridging the gap between academic learning and real-world tech careers.
Engaging with the student community and promoting meaningful learning opportunities.
Developing leadership and communication skills through ambassador activities.
Marketing YSSE activities through road shows, recruitment drives, and campus events to increase visibility and participation.
Organizing and hosting career-specific workshops: CV Writing & Interview Hacks, Career Path of Data Analysts, and Career Live Talks.
Led CMP 7.0 sessions on leadership, teamwork, networking, communication, and public speaking.
Managed recruitment process and outreach for virtual interns, maintaining active communication with participants.
Organizing and coordinating large-scale national and club-level debate championships.
Managing institutional public communications, media partnerships, and press releases.
Directing volunteer groups, orchestrating marketing runs, and driving campus engagement.
Securing corporate sponsorship and leading liaison activities between the club and university administration.
Founded and built the Public Relations division from the ground up.
Managing external communications and partnerships with industry and academic organizations.
Driving awareness campaigns for programming events, workshops, and hackathons.
Building strategic partnerships to expand club visibility and member engagement.
Head Host and Moderator facilitating a favorable learning experience at WSEH.
Promoted interesting and participatory fluency conversations about English.
Provided real-time corrections in grammar, pronunciation, and communication.
Structured online activities: topic-based talks, question-answer sessions, and word games.
Designed and implemented strategic marketing initiatives to gain publicity and reach more people.
Conducted effective promotional campaigns that increased the scope of book reviews and audience interactions.
Leveraged social media tools and content strategies to form an active community of readers.
Examined engagement analytics to refine strategies and ensure messaging reached the target audience.
Facilitated discussions and conducted live interviews on various influential topics.
Controlled instantaneous two-way communication between speakers and viewers.
Managed and produced live events including technical setups, scheduling, and troubleshooting.
Improved participant involvement with live polls, Q&A sessions, and interactive games.
Curated social media content to promote open and positive mental health dialogue.
Designed and implemented content strategy with educational facts, motivational content, and interactive communication.
Organized live sessions and virtual events with mental health professionals.
Helped earn The Magic Shop a reputation as a trusted source of community mental health guidance.

achievements.title: Runner-Up — NSU Cybernauts 2026
achievements.subtitle: National Inter-University Idea to Impact Competition
achievements.description: Secured the Runner-Up position at NSU Cybernauts 2026 held on 17 June 2026 at North South University. Presented 'Nirapotta' — a disaster operating system built on a self-healing mesh architecture for disaster communication.

achievements.title: Selected — Harvard HSIL Hackathon
achievements.subtitle: Among 22 Teams Selected Globally
achievements.description: Selected among 22 teams globally for the prestigious Harvard HSIL Hackathon, showcasing innovative problem-solving and technical capabilities on an international stage.

achievements.title: 2nd Place — AI Innovation Hackathon
achievements.subtitle: Powered by SimpliSolve
achievements.description: Secured second place in the AI Innovation Hackathon powered by SimpliSolve. Learned model training, data processing, and worked with tools and concepts completely new to the team.

achievements.title: Semi-Finalists — FutureMakers
achievements.subtitle: Powered by Grameenphone
achievements.description: Semi-finalists in FutureMakers powered by Grameenphone. Developed an AI-backed solution from the ground up, creating software designed to make a tangible impact in people's lives.

achievements.title: Champion — Poster Presentation
achievements.subtitle: Disaster Management Exercise 4.0 (BUP)
achievements.description: IUB's Team Bhumikompo became Champion in the Poster Presentation segment at Disaster Management Exercise 4.0, organized by BUP Disaster Management Forum on September 25, 2025. Developed 'IoT-Based Centralized Earthquake Response and Recovery Platform for Bangladesh'.

achievements.title: Data Analyst Bootcamp Graduate
achievements.subtitle: Data Solution-360 (Batch-2518)
achievements.description: Completed the Data Analyst Job Ready Boot-Camp with Data Solution-360, mastering SQL, Python, Machine Learning, Power BI, Excel, Probability, and Statistics for turning raw data into actionable insights.

achievements.title: PR & Event Leadership
achievements.subtitle: IUB Debate Club & Programming Club
achievements.description: Successfully managed PR campaigns and event logistics for multiple high-profile debate tournaments and programming events with 500+ participants nationwide.

achievements.title: Full-Stack Project Development
achievements.subtitle: Core Technical Projects
achievements.description: Designed and deployed complex applications combining web technologies, mobile components, and AI pipelines including Pedi-Growth, Nirapotta, and the Earthquake Response Platform.
